name: crevideo-reach
description: Turn Claude into your TikTok Shop affiliate outreach & marketing assistant — 9 skills (1 base playbook `mcp-playbook` + 8 business-scenario skills: creator fit scoring / tier resolver / offer policy / brand safety / outreach composer / reply triage / win-back & pruning / performance diagnosis) + Crevideo Reach MCP (79 tools, auto-registers as connector, OAuth sign-in). Works with Claude Code, Claude.ai web, and OpenAI Codex.
